title: santaloides erecta
intro: Santaloides erecta, also known as Sandalwood, is a type of plant native to Australia that belongs to the Santalaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Santaloides erecta include its ability to improve skin health, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Santaloides erecta include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
